Book A Visit
Ages 4.5 - 5.5 Years

UKG
Program

A joyful and vibrant learning environment focused on developing curiosity, creativity, and foundational social skills for your fast-growing toddler.

Enroll Now
Program Overview

Fostering Joyful Discovery

Our UKG curriculum bridges the gap between toddlerhood and structured learning. We introduce more engaging academic concepts naturally through play, storytelling, and collaborative activities, helping children build lasting confidence.

Reading & Writing

Fostering independent reading skills, sight word recognition, and handwriting development in preparation for formal schooling.

Pre-Primary Math

Developing logical reasoning through addition/subtraction introductions, complex pattern recognition, and early time-telling concepts.

Scientific Exploration

Encouraging curiosity through simple, safe scientific experiments, observing nature, and understanding basic "how and why" concepts.

Daily Routine

A Day in UKG

08:30 AM - 09:00 AM

School Readiness & Assembly

A prompt start with morning prayers, national anthem, news sharing, and setting daily learning goals.

09:00 AM - 10:00 AM

Advanced Literacy & Writing

Dedicated time for sentence construction, independent reading practice, and structured cursive handwriting.

10:00 AM - 10:30 AM

Nutrition Break & Socializing

Independent snack time emphasizing table etiquette, cleanup routines, and casual peer conversations.

10:30 AM - 11:30 AM

Mathematics & Logic

Interactive lessons on simple addition, subtraction, time-telling, and complex spatial reasoning puzzles.

11:30 AM - 12:30 PM

Project Work & Departure

Collaborative science projects or thematic art, followed by a structured review of the day's learnings.

Curriculum Details

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the key focus areas in the UKG curriculum?
  • Advanced social skills and collaborative play
  • Fine and gross motor skill enhancement
  • Math Readiness (Counting, sorting, sizes)
  • Language Readiness (Phonics, vocabulary expansion)
  • Environmental awareness and exploration
What special activities are included?

We offer a variety of special engaging activities designed to nurture diverse talents:

Creative Arts Personality Development Showstopper Mental Might Augmented Reality - Fantasy Box Eco-conscious Tell-a-Tale (Storytelling) Library Time Sciencify (Early Science) Whirl & Twirl Sensorium Critical Thinking Integrated Sanskar
What does a typical session consist of?

Our daily sessions carefully balance advanced academic foundations with engaging projects:

Morning Assembly Independent Reading Math & Logic Puzzles Cursive Writing Science Experiments Outdoor Sports Collaborative Arts Public Speaking Prep Field Visits Cultural Studies Independent Snack Time
